baseSpans.name: execute_event_loop_cycle
baseSpans.input: You have access to weather and time tools. When asked about weather, use get_weather. When asked about time, use get_time. Be concise. Use both the get_weather tool AND the get_time tool for Paris. Call both tools exactly once each.

agentSpans.input: You have access to weather and time tools. When asked about weather, use get_weather. When asked about time, use get_time. Be concise. Use both the get_weather tool AND the get_time tool for Paris. Call both tools exactly once each.
agentSpans.output: The weather in Paris is cloudy with a temperature of 62°F. The current time is 8:00 AM CET.
